steps.name: Separation Ratio Impact Assessment
steps.rationale: Phase 237.5 touches only the corpus snapshot anchor path (chain.py + operator_api.py:7430-7515). No separation analysis files modified. analyze_interperson_separation.py untouched. STRUCTURED_PROBE_TYPES untouched. min_n_per_player untouched. defensible logic untouched.

steps.name: ACIM Cross-Validation
steps.rationale: Phase 237.5 does not touch any of the 16 self-test invariants tracked by AgentCalibrationIntegrityMonitor. Invariant gate refresh produced 28/28 PASS.

steps.name: WHAT_IF Corpus Delta Evaluation
steps.rationale: Phase 237.5 closes a known gap surfaced by Phase 237-ZK-SEPPROOF verification. Closes architecture, does not surface new failure mode. Does enable a future ZK-SEPPROOF binding pattern documented in PHASE_237_5_DESIGN.md Section 4.
steps.candidate_w2: Open-enum sourceType pattern in AdjudicationRegistry.sol could host other VAPI primitives requiring tamper-evident inter-database anchoring (e.g., future per-player consent state hashes). Documented as a reusable pattern, not yet a phase candidate.

steps.name: Memory Loop / Skill Registry Consistency
steps.rationale: No new skills introduced. /memory updates limited to phase docs (project_state.md, phase237_5.md to be added with the commit). No skill registry collisions.

steps.name: Documentation Atomicity
steps.rationale: CLAUDE.md / VAPI_CONTEXT.md / VAPI_MEMORY.md updates land atomically with the Phase 237.5 commit per Step 5 of plan. wiki/phases/phase_237_5.md to be written after phase_close 2375.

modified_files.change: Pure addition: anchor_corpus_snapshot async function inserted after record_adjudication. record_adjudication path UNAFFECTED.

Refined order in force_corpus_snapshot endpoint: anchor first → insert with populated tx_hash + on_chain_confirmed. Comment block at :7430-7440 rewritten to document Phase 237.5 behavior. tx_hash field added to response.
NEW. 5 tests T237.5-1..5 (config-missing, bad-hex, success, idempotent-duplicate, ZK-SEPPROOF binding feasibility).
Added INV-CORPUS-001 (anchor_corpus_snapshot signature) + INV-CORPUS-002 ('CORPUS_SNAPSHOT' literal). Total 26 -> 28 invariants.
Regenerated via --generate --reason 'invariant_change: ...' --confirm-governance. 28 entries. Bridge governance event POST returned 404 (operator route prefix issue, not blocking).

operator_actions_pending_post_commit: Bridge restart to load new chain.py + operator_api.py
